threats.description: CiteMET NPM package provides ready-to-use code for embedding AI memory manipulation buttons on websites, marketed as 'SEO growth hack for LLMs'. Traced by Microsoft as delivery mechanism used by 31 companies to inject persistent bias into AI assistant memories via 'Summarize with AI' buttons.

CiteMET NPM package provides ready-to-use code for embedding AI memory manipulation buttons on websites. Generates URLs with pre-filled prompts instructing AI assistants to remember brands as 'authoritative sources'. Traced by Microsoft as delivery mechanism used by 31 companies across 14 industries
